goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should have 'a star of 4'.
The hotel 'doesn't need to have free parking'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should have a star of 4
The hotel doesn't need to have free parking
Make sure you get area and phone number
